title: Regulatory Affairs Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate production activities of an organization to ensure compliance with regulations and standard operating procedures.

tasks.text: Develop regulatory strategies and implementation plans for the preparation and submission of new products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review all regulatory agency submission materials to ensure timeliness, accuracy, comprehensiveness, or compliance with regulatory standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct the preparation and submission of regulatory agency applications, reports, or correspondence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate product complaints and prepare documentation and submissions to appropriate regulatory agencies as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide responses to regulatory agencies regarding product information or issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Represent organizations before domestic or international regulatory agencies on major policy matters or decisions regarding company products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide regulatory guidance to departments or development project teams regarding design, development, evaluation, or marketing of products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage activities such as audits, regulatory agency inspections, or product recalls.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate regulatory information to multiple departments and ensure that information is interpreted correctly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge of relevant regulations, including proposed and final rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Formulate or implement regulatory affairs policies and procedures to ensure that regulatory compliance is maintained or enhanced.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct documentation efforts to ensure compliance with domestic and international regulations and standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review materials such as marketing literature or user manuals to ensure that regulatory agency requirements are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Participate in the development or implementation of clinical trial protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement or monitor complaint processing systems to ensure effective and timely resolution of all complaint investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish procedures or systems for publishing document submissions in hardcopy or electronic formats.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish regulatory priorities or budgets and allocate resources and workloads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train staff in regulatory policies or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain standard operating procedures or local working practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contribute to the development or implementation of business unit strategic and operating plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor regulatory affairs activities to ensure their alignment with corporate sustainability or green initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate internal discoveries and depositions with legal department staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor emerging trends regarding industry regulations to determine potential impacts on organizational processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop relationships with state or federal environmental regulatory agencies to learn about and analyze the potential impacts of proposed environmental policy regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor regulatory affairs trends related to environmental issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate regulatory affairs aspects that are specifically green, such as the use of toxic substances in packaging, carbon footprinting issues, or green policy implementation.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Evaluate new software publishing systems and confer with regulatory agencies concerning news or updates on electronic publishing of submissions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
